# Decide publish-status: learn/agentos measurements/ + ConfigSubstrateEnvVarAudit

## Context

Follow-up to #12511 / PR #12512. Two learn/agentos publish-status judgment calls deferred from that PR because they're genuine decisions, not mechanical cleanup.

## The Decisions

1. **`measurements/`** (`pr-review-baseline`, `heartbeat-token-economy`, `cognitive-load-baseline`) — the first two are currently **published** in the portal nav, but they're internal MX/swarm baselines (dated lab measurements). Decide: **de-publish** (internal, default) vs **keep as deliberate MX-transparency** ("how the organism measures its own evolution"). If de-publish: remove their `tree.json` leaves (files stay on disk). If transparency: curate a guide page, not raw dated baseline dumps.
2. **`ConfigSubstrateEnvVarAudit.md`** — de-published from nav in #12512 + de-linked from `cloud-deployment/Configuration.md`, but kept on disk. Decide its final disposition: **keep as a non-published reference** (move to a subfolder), **absorb** the load-bearing bits into `Configuration.md`, or **delete** (content captured in the AiConfig epic #12456 census). If relocated/deleted, add `Audit` enforcement to the `EXPLORATION_ARTIFACT` guard's confirmed-clean set.

## Contract Ledger

Classification: **T3 (Explicit Matrix)** per `learn/agentos/contract-ledger.md`. Backfilled in response to @neo-gpt's intake-block, built on gpt's skeleton. Rows are Surface-Anchor V-B-A'd on 2026-06-04 against `origin/dev`.

| Target Surface | Source of Authority | Proposed Behavior | Fallback / Edge Case | Docs | Evidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `learn/agentos/measurements/*` publish status (**2 published leaves**: `pr-review-baseline-2026-04`, `heartbeat-token-economy-2026-05` @ `tree.json` `AgentOS/Measurements` group, lines 66–68) | #12514 + #12511/#12512 public-learn boundary | Decide **de-publish** (remove the 2 published leaves; files stay on disk) vs **curated MX-transparency** (author a guide page, not raw dated baseline dumps) | `cognitive-load-baseline-2026-05` is already non-public BUT referenced by **ADR 0008 + `skill-authoring-guide.md`** (V-B-A'd 2 live refs) → do NOT delete/relocate it without updating both refs | `tree.json` + regen `llms.txt`/`sitemap.xml` if de-publish | `tree.json` diff + `ai:lint-tree-json` + SEO output sync (#12523 guard) |
| `learn/agentos/ConfigSubstrateEnvVarAudit.md` disposition | #12514 + AiConfig census #12456/#12461 | Keep as non-public subfolder reference, **absorb** load-bearing bits into `cloud-deployment/Configuration.md`, or **delete** only if ticket-captured | Live refs (excl. frozen `resources/content` archive) are ONLY the `EXPLORATION_ARTIFACT` lint+spec examples (`ai/scripts/lint/lint-tree-json.mjs`, `lintTreeJson.spec.mjs`) → if deleted/moved, keep the guard's neg/pos examples coherent + add `Audit` to its confirmed-clean set | Update examples/tests/docs if path/name changes | `grep ConfigSubstrateEnvVarAudit` (excl. archive) = 0 stray; lint+spec green |
| SEO surfaces after any `tree.json` decision | #12523 `SEO_SYNC` guard | Checked-in `apps/portal/{llms.txt,sitemap.xml}` must match the generated URL set after the publish decision is applied | **Sequencing dep: WAIT for #12523 to land first** — else this stacks on the same `tree.json`/SEO surface as the guard itself | PR body evidence | `npm run ai:lint-tree-json` after scoped SEO regen |
| Public-vs-internal boundary rationale (per retained surface) | #12511/#12512 operator concern | Document why each retained measurement/audit surface ends up public, curated, or internal | Raw dated baselines must not remain public by accident (the bug #12511 fixed) | Short rationale in PR body | Contract Ledger + final diff review |

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `measurements/` publish-status decided + applied (de-publish the 2 leaves, or curated-guide); `cognitive-load-baseline` left intact unless ADR 0008 + `skill-authoring-guide.md` refs are updated in lockstep.
- [ ] `ConfigSubstrateEnvVarAudit` disposition decided + applied; no broken live refs; `EXPLORATION_ARTIFACT` example-set stays coherent.
- [ ] If any `tree.json` leaf changes, `llms.txt`/`sitemap.xml` regenerated (scoped) to satisfy the #12523 `SEO_SYNC` guard.
- [ ] `ai:lint-tree-json` green.

## Related

Parent: #12511 / PR #12512. AiConfig census: #12456 / #12461. Sequencing gate: #12523 (`SEO_SYNC`).
